reviews.review_description: It’s fun and all and I like the design, but you get stuck so much, and i don’t know if this is world wide, but a week ago or so my hands stopped appearing for me and my friend, and when I could play with my hands, sometimes it would say, wrong direction, returning to course, and it sets me back by so much, and when I was trying to get a character I had to win the track 5 times before it would let me get it.
Great game all around just wish you had an open lobby for multiplayer most people online only want to race people they know

Fun game with solid game play and tracks once you get the hang of it. The issue is that multiplayer sucks. Has yet to work for me. The whole reason I got the game was the race with my son. It’s a 2 star game at best without the option to play with friends. Every time we’ve tried it says “location not joinable.” Fix this issue and the rating goes up significantly.

developer_response.body:
Hi danny, can I help you out with that?
If you looks for the server list you can join the game through your username's room.
Unfortunately the invite system got broken, but we are working to try to fix it.
Thanks for the review though!

reviews.review_description: Just an overall fun experience, especially after a stressful day at work.

developer_response.body:
Glad to know that we can make your day end better!
Thanks a lot for the review!

reviews.review_description: I was able to play multiplayer a few times. Now it will show the lobby but when I select join, it sends me back to the home screen. Tried restarting the game and headset. Didnt change the outcome. Maybe a bug. Would be great to be able to connect to a room without being disconnected 9 out of 10 times... other than that. This game f"@&$,ng rocks, the game play and controls are really nice, their Aim assisted items makes for easy overtakes but just as easy to be overtaken! Love the music for each map. The themes were well thought about. Its fairly polished in the game play and mechanics. Overall, This game is fantastic. If you want to play Mario kart vr ..this is it! Obviously there are differences. This game is definitely giving N64 feels between mario kart and crash bandicoot racing. You won't be disappointed having this game. Just as long as you can do multiplayer... I see a bunch of lobbies but I can't join them on command. I'll change my rating to 5 stars once the joining problem is solved

developer_response.body:
Hey brother Laydown, thanks a lot for the great review!
It is really sad that you had this bad experience in the multiplayer, we will try to reproduce it here to fix it, but so far we didn't had the same problem so we could extract logs to check what is going on.
If you join us on Discord maybe we can play together to try to fix that!
Thanks a lot!

reviews.review_description: It like m Mario kart and it's really good you like play different maps and stuff and that's pretty good and you get those power rafts and you get those I don't know why the girls said that she gets stuck but I think that's because she's been using that crash unable thing anyway so thank you earnest for making this owners that's better
Great game to play with friends, but some things that need to be fixed but nothing that ruins the experience.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot Mr. MoneyMAKEEEEEEEEEEEEERRRRRRRRR
Glad that you enjoyed the game, please share what is your pain and we will try to work to fix them ASAP!

reviews.review_description:
I like the tracks, the graphics are OK most of the time and playing in single player is OK. 

Fact is, I'm likely to play this with friends and this is where the game gets to be a mixed bag. The invite friends component doesn't seem to work. You may or may not have voice chat. Your race may crash. Your chosen character and kart may be changed at the whimsy of the game. I found when voice chat didn't work for me, I didn't enjoy the game very much. But when the sun, moon, and stars all finally align for a working game, it can be fun.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, happy Xmas!
I am very sorry for your bad experience, actually we hardly get complaints about the MP (apart from the invite feature that we know it has been broken after some Meta OS updates).
If you could join our Discord I would gladly try to pinpoint these issues, although I already made our team aware and we will try to work on them ASAP. 
Happy holidays, hope you can get back at us soon.

Cheers

reviews.review_description: I used to love playing online with friends until that doesn't work which is difficult to understand when they game advertising multiplayer. For that reason it has to be a one star. Shame as I used to love the game.

developer_response.body:
Hey there Markio!
Would you mind join our Discord so we can talk one-one?
Just tried the game here and there was no problem on join other people's room or to create my own.
Thanks for getting in touch though

reviews.review_description: I'm really enjoying this game in single player mode! I can even run in place while I drive with one hand and throw things! This means I can add it to my daily workout and get lots of steps! Good graphics. Fun weapons. Excellent price!

developer_response.body:
Hahaha happy that you are achieving your goals with your smartwatch hahaha
Thanks for reviewing the game and rly glad you have been enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
I like 2-d kart racers a lot but this was a struggle. The controls aren’t very intuitive.  I’m sure there’s some logic to what’s going on, but I didn’t understand why the accelerate button seemed to keep switching between the two triggers. I also struggled trying to grab the power-ups. And the whole idea of having to drive, grab and throw at the same time isn’t for everyone.  There should be an option to just hit a button to throw whatever power-up you have. 
And of course there are motion sickness problems.  Playing on easy was ok, but when I went into training to try to better understand the controls, I don’t know what difficulty setting that corresponds to, but 1 lap was all I could handle.

developer_response.body:
Hey Ryesteve, thanks for sharing your thoughts!
We have several control methods that can be changed on the options, even driving using only the thumbstick is possible if you want more traditional ways to drive.
Although we got to try some auto-launch powerups they always lacked the precision that we wanted to have for the game, but after a little bit of training most of them just need to be grabbed (as the driver's skill) and activated using the trigger.
Hope you can try the other methods and enjoy the game more! Otherwise let us know on Discord or mail ;)
Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Best Mario Kart clone so far.
reviews.review_description: Well done and we'll balanced with personality and good basic gameplay for a kart game. It just needs a little bit... More. A progressive system to start like earning coins to upgrade buy new tracks or carts and custom cosmetics. Rearview and easier throws behind you back. After a single player race it takes too long to end or go on to next. I also wish games would bring back the car combat arenas like in the twisted metal days.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review!
We actually talked a lot about having a combat arena, but we dropped the idea and focused in create more tracks.
If you want to contribute more, please join our Discord!

reviews.review_description: Purchased the game for myself and 3 friends with the intent to jam out on some serious multi-player kart madness only to find that multiplayer doesn't work. Tried inviting from each person and all receive the same error. Moved on to trouble shooting and confirmed all have the same version on Quest 3 OS and installed version of Galaxy Kart. A true holiday bummer.

developer_response.body:
Hey there,
We use EOS as a networking solution (same from Fortinite, RocketLeague, FallGuys) and it had some problems the last 2 days.
Anyway we will look into it to make it better, we usually don't get complaints about the MP in the game...
Sorry about it.

reviews.review_title: This game feels like Bumper Cars…
reviews.review_description:
But on a race track.  The control is much better and forgiving than most racing games but is fun , fast, collision and driving really does feel like bumper cars.  There are quirky and odd environmental hazards that might also be a downside because it’s difficult to tell where or when you risk getting hit with something negative.  The stunts, jumps, and ramps are a bit of a throwback to track car racing,  Overall this game is pretty fun without complex inaccurate controls similar games tend to have.  There can be some slight disorientation on sharp turns or jumps but this is relatively mild compared to other rapid movement games.

You are welcome.  It is one of the more fun games so far l

developer_response.body:
Thanks Xeraphas!
Really appreciate the time and dedication you put to write a so detailed review, it means a lot to us that you have done that and that you are actually having fun in the game!
Hope we can see each other in a online race ;)

reviews.review_title: I cant see my hand to click

developer_response.body:
Hi Oraha, hope you doing well!
Can you please try to reset your save data of the game? That is a workaround know for this bug, while we couldn't fix it yet.
If your problem persist can you join our Discord?

reviews.review_description: This is a surprisingly polished racing game that’s really fun and satisfying to play! It’s basically Mario Kart in vr! The racing mechanics feel really realistic and natural and the powerups are varied and fun to use. Bhaptics support gives a HUGE boost in immersion here, all the way from feeling the engine behind you to the speed to the collisions and powerups. It really feels like you’re in a go kart in real life. Despite the multiplayer complaints, it worked flawlessly for me and it was a blast to play with friends. Overall, this is an excellent and immersive racing game for vr that I highly recommend if you like games like Mario Kart!

developer_response.body:
Glad to know that bHaptics are working properly, actually I was the one implementing it and it is such a pleasure to hear people using it!
Thanks a lot for your kind words! Join our Discord so we can play together!

reviews.review_title: Multiplayer didn’t work for me either
reviews.review_description: Would be way funnier if could play with kids in multiplayer

developer_response.body:
Hey Mr. Jazz, would love to help you out with it.
If you can send us an email or join our Discord I can guide you, but when you go to the server list of other devices you can't see the room you created? What is happening?
Kind regards,

reviews.review_description: Multiplayer works

developer_response.body:
Hey brother, sorry about the bad experience.
Indeed yesterday and today our MP service provider (Epic Online Services) had problems and thr MP was malfunctioning. 
Hope everything is behaving well now, otherwise pleaseel contact us!

reviews.review_description: If you like Mario Kart then you’ll like Galaxy Kart, good graphics and gameplay and seriously addictive

developer_response.body:
Thanks oh mr. Lord Lukem!
Hope you are enjoying our game a lot, did you already unlock all the racers?

reviews.review_title: Great game, but gets you dizzy
reviews.review_description: Great game, but gets you dizzy and seasick.

developer_response.body:
We recommend adjusting the tunelling view to the max to reduce it, but even though we tried some solutions we know it isn't the more comfortable. 
Thanks for the 4 star, hope you have a happy new year!

reviews.review_description: Even though I didn't get it free. I think making this game free and adding cosmetics would be a lot better to add more players!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review Galaxyhub! Really appreciate it!
We have been trying some strategies to boost more players into the MP, right now the game became part of Horizon+ program and we saw an increase to close to 600 Daily Active User, which should put some breath on the the MP!
Thanks for the support!

reviews.review_description:
theres other cartoony quest car games that tries to emulate mario kart.... they all Garbage🚮🚮🚮

then I found this.. 💯 this is the best mario kart type of game on quest.. done right, nice maps, nice graphics, nice little progression system, abd GREAT SIMPLE CONTROLS💯💯💯💯... unique characters with their own special moves... i play with 2 other family members and its a blast.. I don't have any complaints honestly.... 

Just a good Quality game . period 💯💯💯

developer_response.body: <3 <3 <3 thank you so much for your kind words!

reviews.review_title: Fun Kart Racer, Needs Some Polish
reviews.review_description:
Ok, this game is brushing up against greatness, it just needs a few things. The tracks are fun and varied, the items are cool, it's got a great vibe! It really needs a bit of polish to get it all the way there.
If I'm the only human being in a race, I should not have to wait for all CPU racers to finish. Give me the option to continue to the next race.
3-race circuits just end and send you back to the main menu. No medal or trophy ceremony, not even a screen that says "Good job!" or something.
And I know there are different control schemes, but I wish I could make one of the face buttons accelerate instead.  I'm not sure if this game is still being supported, but a few small things would go a long way.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! Actually when you only have CPU racers indeed the game should only take 30s to jump to the next race, if that is not happening is a bug :P. This time is to check your time and have some breathing time.
If you WIN top 3 places in a race or Tournament you go to the Podium in the Lobby, we could do a better job on giving a reward for it, but indeed our cash and time had run out :P.
Buttons customization was something that we discussed back in the past, who know maybe in the future we can do it, but unfortunately the game sold MUCH less than expected and keep selling bad so it is hard to actually assign a team to do MORE development on it :(.
Thanks for the support!

reviews.review_description: Great game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing the game!!! Hope you can keep playing online to increase the player base.
Right now we are close to 500 daily active user, but not all of them play online.

reviews.review_description: Hi just wondering why all of a sudden over the past month my friends and me can't play online,all we get is the same message 'can't invite players to this location'....Is there any way you can help,thanks,ian.

developer_response.body:
Hey Ian, 
We had a problem with the invite not working anymore due to system updates, but you should be able to create a room and your friends should be able to join it.
I will jump in the game to test if everything is fine, but it should be :D.

Thanks for letting us know and for playing the game!

reviews.review_description:
This game is a dream come true! As a long time Mario Kart fan, this is the closest and best experience you can get in VR. It deserves to be way more popular than it is! 

The gameplay is great, the driving is smooth, it doesn't make me motion sick and the items are a blast! It can be pretty comical at times.

I will definitely be recommending it to my friends and I intend to make some content on it in hopes to bring some new players or motivate previous players to come back so the multiplayer is more active. 

Overall an incredible experience and some of the most fun times I've had on VR!

developer_response.body:
OMG...
THANK YOU SO MUCH!
You made our day! <3 <3 <3

reviews.review_title: I still can't see my hands so can't play
reviews.review_description:
Game loads, but my hands don't - running on quest 3 😔. No other game has this issue 

Loved playing this with mates

Please update your game, please help

developer_response.body:
Hey man, would you mind joining our Discord so we can assist you? (https://discord.gg/guqKjs4d34)
Are you playing with controllers? Or trying hand tracking? We currently do not support hand tracking.

Kind regards,

reviews.review_description:
It's a kart racer with good mechanics, control feels nice, weapons are varied and easy to use. It looks pretty good for standalone but I really think they could push the headset a little more. I played mostly offline, I was able to join one online match..it was fine it worked like it should. The reason I feel that it's only getting 4 stars is because it doesn't feel complete in the back end.  I was having a hard time finding incentive to keep playing once I played all the tracks with their different levels of difficulty. I wish we could choose faster engines if the game is following the Mario kart blueprint. Also more maps. Hopefully not hidden behind DLC.  This game is the best kart racer in VR period. But it has lots of room for improvement.
So if you're looking for a legit fun kart racer with all the mechanics you would want from one. This is.

developer_response.body:
Hey man, thanks so much for your review, we get so happy with the affirmation "This game is the best kart racer in VR", thank you so MUCH! 
Regarding more customization (faster engines) and more levels, due to our low sales it has been hard to be able to continue to provide more content updates, although we would love to.
Hope we can get more content for the game, but it has been hard :(.

reviews.review_description: It's basically mario kart in VR, it has so many items and cool characters, if you like VR and racing games then this is a must buy!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! We are glad you had enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description: This is my first racing game. There are a total of 18 colorful and exciting race tracks and lots of characters, cars and weapons. The effects, music, and visuals are great. I especially like that the tracks are full of life. A fun game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review, very happy you had a great experience!

reviews.review_description: Cool characters and creative tracks. 100000/10

developer_response.body:
BEST PLAYER EVER!!!!!
GUY IS NICE AND GIVE GREAT REVIEW 1000000000/10!

reviews.review_title: game is fun, but it has a major issue
reviews.review_description:
This game has many advantages. The gameplay is familiar and easy to get used to, especially for beginners, as it draws inspiration from Mario Kart. The charming cartoon rendering is also a plus. Additionally, there's multiplayer mode.

However, this game has a significant issue: it lacks a captivating representative character that appeals to everyone, regardless of age or gender. Even the main thumbnail features a scowling hotdog with a mustache... I have no desire to drive with such an unappealing character. Unique and uncommon characters? That's perfectly fine. But if the character lacks charm, then it's a failed uniqueness in my opinion.

To see if this was just my perspective, I let my 12-year-old and 14-year-old nieces play the game. They love Mario Kart. Their first comment was, "Why isn't there a princess in this game?" My nieces dislike characters like the mustached hotdog, the strange cyborg, the angry pirate captain, and the warrior with a weird hairstyle. I share their sentiments.

Recently, I thought the female ninja character was somewhat decent. Please add an attractive character that everyone can enjoy without any preferences. I'm not specifically asking for characters like those in Mario Kart. There are plenty of options for creating characters that are free from copyright issues. For example, a black cat in a hood (like Shrek), a princess resembling Elsa from an ice planet, a space pirate raccoon, or a cute plant character like Baby Groot.

Currently, I've given the game three stars, but if appealing characters are added in the future, I would gladly return to update this review to five stars.

Great game but the multiplayer option could be better, as when you play against friends anyone can join and it should be only the people you invite, it's also very hit and miss when friends try to join, if the multiplayer was better it would definitely be a 5 star

developer_response.body:
Hey Mark, thanks for the review!
We are thinking about creating private lobbies that you access through a CODE.
Would that be a nice feature?
Cheers,

reviews.review_description: 4 stars though because I don’t think you can drift on this game or maybe I just haven’t figured it out yet but it’s super fun still

developer_response.body:
Hey Andre!
Thanks for the review! Hope you change to 5 start once you realize you CAN INDEED drift!
If you check the controls on the option menu you can see that both X or A buttons enable the Drift (shows particles in your wheels as well).
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: It's not a bad game but it's definitely not really good. You don't even bump into cars when they ride by you and having to hold your hands like a steering wheel is there is silly why can't I just use the analog stick (maybe you can I don't know ) The effects of the weapons are hardly noticeable and the tracks are okay at best it's an okay game

developer_response.body:
Hey man, thanks for playing the game.
You may have skipped, but there  are gears on the menu where you can change options.
There you find options to turn on collisions (which are disable by default to prevent motion sickness for some). 
Also there are control schemes, and one is to be able to use the device thumbstick (or the Virtual Joystick that is also nice).
Hope you can revisit the game and check that most of your suggestions were already being done, and please join our Discord and feel free to share more thoughts about the game.
Cheers,

reviews.review_description:
After reading all the reviews I finally decided to try this out and it’s everything that other reviewers have said. It’s basically Mario cart.

The game looks good, campaign is fun, but the core of the games multiplayer does not work. I could only see a couple host server but you cannot join. If you host a server, no one will ever join. 

This is a fairly new game to feel abandoned like this. 

For 2 dollars I cannot complain but still…

Use code Gk90-851899 to get 90 percent while it lasts.

reviews.review_description: The best vr kart racer there is. Great mechanics and courses. Good unlocks for skilled racers

I recommend you to try Harley, but be aware of the crazy speed boost ;)

reviews.review_description:
Just got this game and it looks and plays well, but I literally can only play for a few minutes before I feel sick.

Had my quest for a while so can do alot of different games, but for some reason, this one gets me.

Not sure "Comfortable" is the correct rating to be honest.

May just be me

The game itself though shows alot of promise so hopefully I can get over the feeling.

developer_response.body:
Valeu Juninho!
Did you turn the Tunneling view to the max in the settings? This helps a lot with the comfort settings.

Thanks for playing it!

reviews.review_description:
A great game , highly recommend if you love playing Mario Cart! Great levels and very immersive! 

My only problem I have sometimes is that my field of view shrinks so I can only see a very small circle view of screen.

Edit: Thank you for helping me out with the settings! Been playing every day since I got it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review Shadow!!!
The circle in your view is the option Tunneling View, you can slide it to the left (min) and remove it at the options menu in the tab.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: This is the kart racer you're looking for. Lots of tracks that are all pretty long and fun, good and intuitive controls, and plenty of different items and characters. It also seems to have pretty good comfort settings so you didn't get nauseous, which definitely happened to me in some other similar racing games I tried before choosing this one.

developer_response.body: That is sooo nice to hear! We have put a lot of effort into making the game comfortable, glad you didn't get nauseous!

reviews.review_title: Too much of a tunnel to see clearly
reviews.review_description:
This goes to the developers of this game. It could have been a great game but too much of a problem with the vision throughout the game. It still has a tunnel around your vision when you're driving. Please fix this as soon as possible. Thank you

P.S. this goes to the Developers. Yes I did go to the options and turned off the tunneling and it's still there but not as much. I even uninstalled the game and installed it again and still the same thing. Would you please make it a option where you can't see no tunneling at all. Would you please fix that problem in which when you do this game would be the best one yet. I am looking forward to a response back. Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hey man, 
Thanks for the review!
Did you try to remove the tunneling on the options menu?

Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Good potential but in a poor state
reviews.review_description:
There seems to be a pretty decent amount of tracks (6 trophee, 3 tracks each) However:
- The physics of the game seems to be very inaccurate and quite buggy. Projectiles won't connect and your kart can behave very weirdly against the track edge.
- You can get a decent feeling of speed at max boost, but the default kart speed is quite low.
- Lots of aliasing everywhere, it's distracting

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the reviews! I am sad that it wasn't that nice of a game for you, although I don't get exactly what you mean by projectiles won't connect... if you want to talk with us in our Discord please do!
https://discord.gg/guqKjs4d34

reviews.review_description:
Unable to select anything easily. Not able to set settings to control the car. Kept pausing the race every second. Car stuttering and stopped. Could not compete a race.

Don’t understand why.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games in store
reviews.review_description:
Probably the best game. This game is a must habe for every Mario Kart fan! The different items, characters, cars, and tracks show how much potential this game actually has. While I know that there is some bugs like that the menu jumps around and you can’t press buttons, this game offers you a super fun experience! The steering wheel makes the game great. 

There is 2 things I would add in future updates:
The ability to drift and then get like a boost or something. 
And a graphics update. While the graphic is okay already, I would make things brighter and add a little more detail!

I really hope I will see you in the race!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so MUCH for your kind words!
You made my day, really!
Regarding DRIFT, you can do it already, just hold the top buttons (B or Y) and you get a reduction of your hero skill cooldown ;).
Graphics, we will keep in mind that and try to make the game nicer :D. We struggled to keep 72fps on Quest2, but maybe on Quest3 we could go further :D

reviews.review_description: I like how many maps there are and the power ups

developer_response.body: Thanks Casen! Try to find all the shortcuts, you will be impressed as well ;)

reviews.review_description: It is literally the equivalent to Mario Kart in VR, I’ve always been hesitant to buy a racing game in VR.most reviews are pretty low for VR racing games. they often don’t give a good feeling of speed and seem to be quite dull. This game gives a great sense of speed and being able to use weapons to slow down your opponents will never get old. Like Mario Kart,it also puts obstacles on the course that adds more challenges to the race. It also has the arrows on the tracks that can give you a boost and ramps as well. If you are looking for a ultrarealistic sim racer,this obviously isn’t the game for you. if you are looking for a really fun arcade style racing game, I highly recommend checking this game out

This game shows great potential but also has some major flaws. 

Sometimes you cart can get two wheels stuck on the edge of the track and the race is effectively ruined as you can’t recover fast enough. I had this happen twice in three races! 

Also it’s had to grok the gas pedal. As it’s the top button it has little range. Some corners are very tight and if you come into that corner on a turbo you will not be able to avoid hitting the edge of the track and again quick recovery is a problem. 

Apart from that I think some performance / render analysis would help even out frame dips. If there are several carts nearby the frame rate dips noticeably.

developer_response.body:
Hello NellyG! Firstly, we wanna thank you a lot for taking your time to play Galaxy Kart and write us your review. 🙌✨

Really appreciate you letting us know about these inconsistencies; Your report was already sent to our team and we will investigate it!

Also, would be possible for you to send footage (video/screenshots) from the glitches and frame drops you had & specify the device you are using (Quest 2/3)? It'd be extremely helpful for us to identify what's causing these issues.
You can send us directly on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/guqKjs4d34

Any other feedback you have will be really appreciated! Thank you again,


Orbits VR | Community Manager
VRMonkey 🐒

Thank you again! 🏆


Orbits VR | Community Manager
VRMonkey 🐒

sickness.....but the graphics are great

developer_response.body:
Hey Raymond, thanks for playing the game!
Did you turn the tunneling view to the max? 
We have tried to implement several improvements to avoid motion sickness, hope turning the option on the settings make it better for you ;)
Please feel free to join our Discord so we can personally try to give you more support :D

reviews.review_description: This game is very engaging and fun! It has many maps to race on and many cool characters with fun designs to play with! I looove the clown and my favorite map is the food one!! its the perfect game to play with your friends, the multiplayer really shines! nothing better than taking a shortcut and leaving your friends behind while filling the track with ketchup!! The visuals are colorfull and fun, i love it. Overall i had a really amazing experience with it and i recommend it!
Motion sickness occurs, please update with more appropriate operations.

developer_response.body:
Did you try to increase the tunneling view to the max Ling?
This aids to prevent a lot of motion sickness.
Please join our Discord so we can further guide you ;)
Cheers,

reviews.review_title: The perfect experience for kart lovers ✨
reviews.review_description: For all the MK lovers, this is for sure a true kart experience in VR! Is not only fun, but also unique; each character has its own singularity and personality (and one of the most AMAZING ones is B1lu, an E.T based on a really known Brazilian meme/urban legend, which is by far the most wholesome thing added hahah), every single map has a lot of different elements of surprise and it's always a blast to play with friends 🤗

GK is the perfect casual fun with an easy-to-pick-up style, but it's also very rewarding to learn the maps so you don't miss any boosts or shortcuts. Every character have a main ability as well as a secondary slot for in-game pick-ups, so there is a nice amount of choice for you to find a character that fits your style. Overall, a great game that is quirky and fun.

reviews.review_title: Good game with a bad unlock system
reviews.review_description: Game is good. Probably the best kart game on quest. But the progression is what makes me not enjoy the game for long. You have to play sertain tracks on hard to unlock karts and characters. That means you have to win on easy, medium and than hard to get it. I would love it if all things are unlocked so I can enjoy the full game

developer_response.body:
We hear you! It is something that really make sense, we wanted to give a "prize" to people winning the game on Easy and Normal, but I agree that it can be.. boring.
We have added to our roadmap to remove the difficulty lock, maybe just locking challenge.
If you want to talk more with us, please join our Discord!
